title: pavonia urens var. glabrescens
intro: Pavonia urens var. glabrescens, also known as a variety of the Pavonia urens plant, is a type of flowering plant in the Malvaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating various infections due to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pavonia urens var. glabrescens can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
